parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: numgroupelements
parameters.label: Number of Elements in Group
parameters.description: Output an attribute with the number of elements in the selected group.

parameters.name: appendattrname
parameters.label: Append Attrib Names to Output
parameters.description: Makes the output attribute names include the name of the input attributes that are being analyzed, for clarity.

parameters.name: combine
parameters.label: Combine Components
parameters.description: First perform an operation to combine all components of an attribute into one value, then analye the results.

parameters.name: centroid
parameters.label: Centroid
parameters.description: Outputs the average of the minimum and maximum values of the attribute.

parameters.name: size
parameters.label: Size
parameters.description: Enable size computation on the input attribute by subtracting the minimum value from the maximum values.

parameters.name: minindex
parameters.label: Index of Minimum
parameters.description: Index of the element with the minimum value.

parameters.name: maxindex
parameters.label: Index of Maximum
parameters.description: Index of the element with the maximum value.

parameters.name: sum
parameters.label: Sum
parameters.description: Compute the sum of attribute or components of attribute.

parameters.name: numpointsvertsprims
parameters.label: Num Points, Vertices, Primitives
parameters.description: Output the number of points, vertices, and primitives, in attributes.

parameters.name: numprimsbatch
parameters.label: Num Prims/Verts per Type
parameters.description: Output the number of primitives and vertices per primitive type in attributes.

parameters.name: dimension
parameters.label: Dimension
parameters.description: Outputs the dimension sizes of this .

parameters.name: pattrvals
parameters.label: P Attribute Values
parameters.description: Choose which analyzed result to place in the P attribute.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.
